name: playwright-diagnostics
description: Automated Playwright-based testing and debugging for Cumination.

commands.name: pw-smoke
commands.description: Run a live smoke test for a specific site.

parameters.name: site
parameters.description: The name of the site module (e.g., anybunny)

commands.name: pw-sniff
commands.description: Sniff the network for the first playable video URL.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: The URL of the video page
